events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Riding in an equipment bucket to gain elevated access is a clear OSHA 1926 Subpart O violation (no fall protection, not an approved personnel-lifting method) — this is a **fail**, **critical risk**, requiring the lift be stopped and personnel switched to an approved aerial lift/scaffold or a properly engineered/permitted personnel platform if crane hoisting is truly necessary.
